title: Solo.io Gloo Gateway Upstream
description: An upstream destination registered with Gloo Gateway, representing a backend service such as a Kubernetes service, static host, AWS Lambda function, or other function provider.

metadata.description: Resource metadata including name, namespace, and labels.

status.description: Current status of the upstream resource.

host.description: Hostname or address of the upstream.

port.description: Port number of the upstream service.

rest.description: REST service specification including discovered functions.

grpc.description: gRPC service specification including discovered services.

sslConfig.description: TLS/SSL configuration for the upstream connection.

healthChecks.description: Health check configuration for the upstream.
